common.tagline: Your ward. Your vote. Your proof.

home.eyebrow: Bungoma public participation, live by ward
home.title: County Yangu
home.intro: A public square where every ward can vote on priorities, report issues anonymously, and track what the county builds next.
home.mosaicIntro: Each tile is one Bungoma ward. Brighter tiles show stronger participation and trust signals.
home.parityTitle: Web, USSD, and IVR count the same
home.parityBody: A vote from a smartphone, a keypad phone, or a voice call lands in the same tally and gets the same public evidence trail.
home.trustBody: Report confirmations are sent, then identifying phone details are deleted. Public dashboards show aggregates only.
home.budgetBody: Budget flows connect county envelopes to sectors, wards, and funded projects.

vote.title: Submit your ward vote
vote.intro: Choose your ward, pick one project in the open cycle, and the vote is queued safely if your signal drops.
vote.queued: Your vote is waiting to sync and will send when the connection returns.

report.title: Report an issue
report.intro: Tell the county what is broken or abandoned. You can report without giving your name.
report.privacyBody: We store the ward, category, description, time, channel, and case reference. We do not store your raw phone number with the report.
report.queued: Your report is waiting to sync. Keep the case reference.

track.title: Track a project
track.intro: Search live county projects by ward, status, sector, or contractor.

pulse.title: County Pulse
pulse.intro: Public, aggregate analytics for participation, trust, budgets, project delivery, and channel inclusion.
pulse.formula: Formula: 40% report response speed + 35% project completion rate + 25% budget variance discipline.

alerts.title: Get ward alerts
alerts.intro: Subscribe to SMS or USSD alerts for one ward. Enter only the last digits shown on your confirmation prompt.

how.title: How it works
how.intro: County Yangu gives the same core actions to web, USSD, and IVR users.
how.webBody: Use the full public site on any smartphone browser.
how.ussdBody: Dial the county code, choose your ward, and complete the same vote or report steps.
how.ivrBody: Call, listen, and respond by keypad or voice for the same actions.
how.proof: Every channel updates the same public aggregates.

assembly.title: Ward oversight dashboard
assembly.intro: Authenticated oversight view for Assembly and ICT teams. The demo uses the same aggregate data as County Pulse.
